title: DESIGN.md §1 documents keyfile as 32 bytes but code requires 64 bytes
description: DESIGN.md §1 states the keyfile is 'raw 32 bytes', but daemon/src/main.rs line 63 uses <[u8; 64]>::try_from() and cli code (nie-core identity.rs) creates 64-byte keyfiles (Ed25519 secret key = 32 bytes seed + 32 bytes verifying key = 64-byte expanded form). The documentation is incorrect. Any operator reading DESIGN.md and manually creating or validating a keyfile will use the wrong size expectation. Fix: update DESIGN.md §1 to say '64 bytes (32-byte seed concatenated with 32-byte verifying key, as produced by nie init)'.
